source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder setup contains R-410a at−20\circ\text{C}, x = 20%. The volume is 0.2 m^3. It is known that Vstop = 0.4 m^3, and if the piston sits at the bottom, the spring force balances the other loads on the piston. The system is now heated to 20\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.
